caption: A person with light skin and short hair is shown in a small inset window in the lower-left corner of a screen recording. The person is speaking and looking toward the camera while positioned in front of a light-colored wall. The majority of the screen displays a financial trading platform featuring a candlestick price chart with blue and red trend lines and a horizontal red zone. The "TICKMILL" logo appears prominently in the top-left corner and again within the inset window. Text on the left side of the screen reads "HANDELN SIE AN DEN FINANZMÄRKTEN MIT SICHERHEIT UND VERTRAUEN," followed by a list of features including "PICK-UP-MODUS" and "www.tickmill.com." Across the frames, the person in the inset window continues to speak, with slight changes in facial expression and mouth movement, while the trading chart and surrounding on-screen text remain static.
